t:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
            

                
                
                
                    function subst() {
                        var urlParams = document.location.search.substring(1).split('&');
                        urlParams.forEach(function (urlParam) {
                            var parts = urlParam.split('=', 2);
                            if (parts[0] === 'page' || parts[0] === 'topage') {
                                var elements = document.querySelectorAll('.' + parts[0]);
                                for (var k = 0; k < elements.length; k++) {
                                    elements[k].textContent = decodeURI(parts[1]);
                                }
                            }
                        });
                    }
                
            
            
                

                    
                        /
